messages.content: You are an expert Python programmer.

def rounded_avg(n, m):
    """Given two positive integers n and m, find the average of all integers between n and m inclusive, round this average to the nearest integer, and represent it in binary. Return -1 if n exceeds m.
Example:
rounded_avg(1, 5) => "0b11"
rounded_avg(7, 5) => -1
rounded_avg(10, 20) => "0b1111"
rounded_avg(20, 33) => "0b11010"
"""

Complete the function body above. Return a JSON object with no markdown fences:

}
